title: GCP Pub/Sub topics.publish (REST API, path-routed)
description: Pub/Sub's REST API POSTs to /v1/projects/{project}/topics/{topic}:publish. Point the client library at Lyrebird via its API-endpoint override option (e.g. Go's pubsub.NewClient(ctx, project, option.WithEndpoint(...)), or GOOGLE_API_USE_MTLS_ENDPOINT/custom HTTP client for other languages) and disable TLS transport security for a plain-HTTP Lyrebird target.
